title: App for Testing
managementDescription: Manage your beta testers and get feedback on your projects.
noAppsMessage: Register an App first to recruit testers
reportPlaceholder: Describe your finding in as much detail as possible...
betaActiveDescription: Your project will be visible to the community. Testers will be able to request to join and send you feedback directly from vibecoders.
betaInactiveDescription: Your project will be visible to the community. Testers will be able to request to join and send you feedback directly from vibecoders.
modeOpen: Automatic — any request is accepted instantly
modeClosed: Manual — you approve each request before giving access
limitHelper: When the limit is reached, new requests will be placed on a waiting list.
instructionsPlaceholder: Describe the flows, functions, or specific areas you want testers to evaluate...
instructionsHelper: Testers will see this text before joining.
legalNotice: By opening your project for testing, you accept that vibecoders acts only as a communication channel between you and your testers. You are responsible for the content of your application and the handling of any data it collects.
leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave the squad?
ownerCantJoin: You cannot join your own beta
directorySubtitle: Test products before anyone else, send feedback directly to founders and earn exclusive badges.
emptyMessage: Got an App? Be the first to open your Beta Squad.
confirmJoinMessage: Do you confirm you want to join as a tester for {appName}?
joinLegalNotice: Your public profile and feedback will be shared with the creator of this app. vibecoders acts only as a communication channel
deleteReportConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this report? This action cannot be undone.
verifyResolutionDesc: The developer has marked this bug as resolved. Please verify if the issue persists.
confirmFixedWarning: This will mark the report as fixed and close it.
stillBrokenWarning: This will reopen the report as still broken.
noReportsYet: You haven't sent any reports yet
confirmRemoveDescription: Are you sure you want to remove
confirmRemoveFromSquad: from your beta squad? This action cannot be undone.
searchTesterDescription: Search for users to add them directly to your beta squad.
startTypingToSearch: Start typing to search for users...
userAlreadyInSquad: User is already in your squad
deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. The report will be permanently removed from our servers.
